observations.label: North Star
observations.description: The ultimate objective of the AgentOS system
observations.evidence: The north star: the user just talks. No commands. No prompts to engineer. No skills to configure.

observations.label: Comprehensive Principle
observations.description: The system must cover the full operating surface of a business
observations.evidence: **Comprehensive not narrow** — covers the full operating surface of a business, not just one department or workflow

observations.label: Role-Centric Architecture
observations.description: The system is designed around roles as the atomic unit of operation
observations.evidence: **Role-centric** — the Role is the atomic unit; everything else is a property or extension of a role

observations.label: Agent Execution
observations.description: The system executes tasks through agents
observations.evidence: The system closes the loop from insight to action; advisors that cannot execute are incomplete

observations.label: Knowledge Domains
observations.description: The system has a registry of 21 knowledge domains
observations.evidence: 21 domains across 6 categories: reality, human, civilization, business, technology, personal, systems, creative

observations.label: Real-Time Intelligence
observations.description: The system has a real-time intelligence layer

observations.label: Business Success
observations.description: The system aims to help businesses succeed
observations.evidence: gives any entrepreneur an elite business brain, operating team, and execution system inside one unified platform

observations.label: System Evolution
observations.description: The system evolves over time through self-improvement
observations.evidence: Weekly self-improvement — workflow evolution, agent proposals

observations.label: User Feedback
observations.description: The system receives feedback from users
observations.evidence: The system serves the human — not the reverse

observations.label: System Timeline
observations.description: The system has a timeline of development and updates

relationships.description: The North Star goal enables the system to provide real-time intelligence
The Comprehensive Principle constrains the system to be role-centric
The Agent Execution action produces outcomes such as business success
The Knowledge Domains resource requires the system to have a real-time intelligence layer
The System Evolution change causes the system to receive user feedback
